result.stdout:
Description:
  rncc

Usage:
  rncc [<paths>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <paths>  The path of the solution file, project file, project directory or source files.

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                             Specifies the output directory.
  --base-name <base-name>                           Specifies the base name of the output files.
  --nullable <Annotations|Disable|Enable|Warnings>  Represents the default state of nullable analysis in this compilation. [default: Annotations]
  --checked                                         Indicates whether to check for overflow and underflow.
  --assembly                                        Indicates whether to generate assembly.
  --generate-artifacts <All|Library|None|Source>    Instruct the compiler how to generate artifacts.
  --security-analysis                               Whether to perform security analysis on the compiled contract
  --generate-interface                              Generate interface file for contracts with the Contract attribute
  --generate-plugin                                 Generate a Neo N3 plugin for interacting with the compiled contract
  --generate-webgui                                 Generate an interactive web GUI for the compiled contract
  --deploy-webgui                                   Deploy the generated WebGUI to R3E hosting service
  --webgui-service-url <webgui-service-url>         URL of the R3E WebGUI hosting service [default: https://api.r3e-gui.com]
  --contract-address <contract-address>             The deployed contract address for WebGUI deployment
  --network <network>                               The network where the contract is deployed [default: testnet]
  --deployer-address <deployer-address>             The address of the contract deployer
  --optimize <All|Basic|Experimental|None>          Optimization level. e.g. --optimize=All
  --no-inline                                       Instruct the compiler not to insert inline code.
  --address-version <address-version>               Indicates the address version used by the compiler. [default: 53]
  -d, --debug <Extended|None|Strict>                Indicates the debug level.
  --version                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                    Show help and usage information
